notes: Source scopes and parser rules are authoritative.
The manpage scope is included as documentation metadata and may disagree with the source.
For window|pane options, tmux defaults to window scope unless -p is used.
User options (@name) are not stored in options_table and are modeled separately below.

other_accepted_forms: numeric aliases 0-7 and 90-97 for base/bright ANSI colours

tmux_command.description: Any tmux command or command list accepted by cmd_parse_from_string.

format_string.description: tmux format string; many options also accept strftime sequences.

pseudo_options.description: User options may have any name beginning with @ and accept any string value.
notes: Scope follows the same set-option flags as other options.
Without -s/-w/-p, set-option treats user options as session options by default.

options.name: activity-action
options.description: Action to take on an activity alert.

options.name: aggressive-resize
options.description: When 'window-size' is 'smallest', whether the maximum size of a window is the smallest attached session where it is the current window ('on') or the smallest session it is linked to ('off').

options.name: allow-passthrough
options.description: Whether applications are allowed to use the escape sequence to bypass tmux. Can be 'off' (disallowed), 'on' (allowed if the pane is visible), or 'all' (allowed even if the pane is invisible).

options.name: allow-rename
options.description: Whether applications are allowed to use the escape sequence to rename windows.

options.name: allow-set-title
options.summary: Allow apps to set pane titles
options.description: Whether applications are allowed to use the escape sequence to set the pane title.

options.name: alternate-screen
options.description: Whether applications are allowed to use the alternate screen.

options.name: assume-paste-time
options.description: Maximum time between input to assume it is pasting rather than typing.

options.name: automatic-rename
options.description: Whether windows are automatically renamed.

options.name: automatic-rename-format
options.description: Format used to automatically rename windows.

options.name: backspace
options.description: The key to send for backspace.

notes: Base key names are static, but modifiers, UTF-8 keys, hex codepoints, and UserN keys expand the valid space.

options.name: base-index
options.summary: First window index in a session
options.description: Default index of the first window in each session.

options.name: bell-action
options.description: Action to take on a bell alert.

options.name: buffer-limit
options.description: The maximum number of automatic buffers. When this is reached, the oldest buffer is deleted.

options.name: clock-mode-colour
options.description: Colour of the clock in clock mode.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: clock-mode-style
options.description: Time format of the clock in clock mode.

options.name: codepoint-widths
options.summary: List of override widths for Unicode codepoints
options.description: Array of override widths for Unicode codepoints.

notes: Malformed entries are ignored when the width cache is rebuilt.

options.name: command-alias
options.description: Array of command aliases. Each entry is an alias and a command separated by '='.

notes: Each array item is alias=command; tmux does not validate the alias string at set time.

options.name: copy-command
options.summary: Command to run when text is copied
options.description: Shell command run when text is copied. If empty, no command is run.

options.name: copy-mode-current-match-style
options.summary: Style for the current search match in copy mode
options.description: Style of the current search match in copy mode.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: copy-mode-mark-style
options.summary: Style for the marked line in copy mode
options.description: Style of the marked line in copy mode.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: copy-mode-match-style
options.summary: Style for search matches in copy mode
options.description: Style of search matches in copy mode.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: copy-mode-position-format
options.summary: Format for the position indicator in copy mode
options.description: Format of the position indicator in copy mode.

options.name: copy-mode-position-style
options.summary: Style for position indicator in copy mode
options.description: Style of position indicator in copy mode.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: copy-mode-selection-style
options.summary: Style for selection in copy mode
options.description: Style of selection in copy mode.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: cursor-colour
options.description: Colour of the cursor.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: cursor-style
options.description: Style of the cursor.

options.name: default-client-command
options.summary: Default tmux command with no subcommand
options.description: Default command to run when tmux is run without a command.

options.name: default-command
options.description: Default command to run in new panes. If empty, a shell is started.

options.name: default-shell
options.description: Location of default shell.

notes: The path must pass tmux checkshell validation.

options.name: default-size
options.description: Initial size of new sessions.

options.name: default-terminal
options.description: Default for the 'TERM' environment variable.

notes: The manpage recommends screen/tmux-derived names, but tmux does not enforce that here.

options.name: destroy-unattached
options.summary: Destroy sessions with no attached clients
options.description: Whether to destroy sessions when they have no attached clients, or keep the last session whether in the group.

options.name: detach-on-destroy
options.summary: Client behavior when a session is destroyed
options.description: Whether to detach when a session is destroyed, or switch the client to another session if any exist.

options.name: display-panes-active-colour
options.description: Colour of the active pane for 'display-panes'.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: display-panes-colour
options.description: Colour of not active panes for 'display-panes'.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: display-panes-time
options.description: Time for which 'display-panes' should show pane numbers.

options.name: display-time
options.description: Time for which status line messages should appear.

options.name: editor
options.description: Editor run to edit files.

options.name: escape-time
options.description: Time to wait before assuming a key is Escape.

options.name: exit-empty
options.summary: Exit server when no sessions remain
options.description: Whether the server should exit if there are no sessions.

options.name: exit-unattached
options.summary: Exit server when no clients are attached
options.description: Whether the server should exit if there are no attached clients.

options.name: extended-keys
options.description: Whether to request extended key sequences from terminals that support it.

options.name: extended-keys-format
options.description: The format of emitted extended key sequences.

options.name: fill-character
options.summary: Fill character for unused window areas
options.description: Character used to fill unused parts of window.

menu.pattern: empty or one display-width-1 UTF-8 char

notes: Invalid values are ignored when windows recompute their fill character.

options.name: focus-events
options.description: Whether to send focus events to applications.

options.name: focus-follows-mouse
options.summary: Select panes when the mouse enters them
options.description: Whether moving the mouse into a pane selects it.

options.name: get-clipboard
options.description: When an application requests the clipboard, whether to ignore the request ('off'); respond with the newest buffer ('buffer'); request the clipboard from the most recently used terminal ('request'); or to request the clipboard, create a buffer, and send it to the application ('both').

options.name: history-file
options.description: Location of the command prompt history file. Empty does not write a history file.

options.name: history-limit
options.description: Maximum number of lines to keep in the history for each pane. If changed, the new value applies only to new panes.

options.name: initial-repeat-time
options.description: Time to wait for a key binding to repeat the first time the key is pressed, if it is bound with the '-r' flag. Subsequent presses use the 'repeat-time' option.

options.name: input-buffer-size
options.description: Number of bytes accepted in a single input before dropping.

options.name: key-table
options.description: Default key table. Key presses are first looked up in this table.

notes: Built-in and user-defined key tables are both valid.

options.name: lock-after-time
options.summary: Idle time before locking a client
options.description: Time after which a client is locked if not used.

options.name: lock-command
options.summary: Command used to lock a client
options.description: Shell command to run to lock a client.

options.name: main-pane-height
options.summary: Main pane height in main-horizontal layout
options.description: Height of the main pane in the 'main-horizontal' layout. This may be a percentage, for example '10%'.

notes: tmux does not validate this when the option is set.
Invalid values fall back to layout defaults when used.

options.name: main-pane-width
options.summary: Main pane width in main-vertical layout
options.description: Width of the main pane in the 'main-vertical' layout. This may be a percentage, for example '10%'.

notes: tmux does not validate this when the option is set.
Invalid values fall back to layout defaults when used.

options.name: menu-border-lines
options.description: Type of characters used to draw menu border lines. Some of these are only supported on terminals with UTF-8 support.

options.name: menu-border-style
options.description: Default style of menu borders.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: menu-selected-style
options.description: Default style of selected menu item.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: menu-style
options.description: Default style of menu.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: message-command-style
options.summary: Prompt style in vi command mode
options.description: Style of the command prompt when in command mode, if 'mode-keys' is set to 'vi'.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: message-format
options.description: Format string for the prompt and message area. The '#{message}' placeholder is replaced with the content.

options.name: message-limit
options.description: Maximum number of server messages to keep.

options.name: message-line
options.description: Position (line) of messages and the command prompt.

options.name: message-style
options.description: Style of messages and the command prompt. A 'fill' attribute controls background clearing and a 'width' attribute (fixed or percentage) constrains the prompt area width.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: mode-keys
options.description: Key set used in copy mode.

options.name: mode-style
options.summary: Style for indicators and highlighting in modes
options.description: Style of indicators and highlighting in modes.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: monitor-activity
options.description: Whether an alert is triggered by activity.

options.name: monitor-bell
options.description: Whether an alert is triggered by a bell.

options.name: monitor-silence
options.description: Time after which an alert is triggered by silence. Zero means no alert.

options.name: mouse
options.description: Whether the mouse is recognised and mouse key bindings are executed. Applications inside panes can use the mouse even when 'off'.

options.name: other-pane-height
options.summary: Other pane height in main-horizontal layout
options.description: Height of the other panes in the 'main-horizontal' layout. This may be a percentage, for example '10%'.

notes: tmux does not validate this when the option is set.
Invalid values fall back to layout defaults when used.

options.name: other-pane-width
options.summary: Other pane width in main-vertical layout
options.description: Height of the other panes in the 'main-vertical' layout. This may be a percentage, for example '10%'.

notes: tmux does not validate this when the option is set.
Invalid values fall back to layout defaults when used.

options.name: pane-active-border-style
options.description: Style of the active pane border.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: pane-base-index
options.summary: First pane index in each window
options.description: Index of the first pane in each window.

options.name: pane-border-format
options.summary: Text format for pane border status lines
options.description: Format of text in the pane status lines.

options.name: pane-border-indicators
options.description: Whether to indicate the active pane by colouring border or displaying arrow markers.

options.name: pane-border-lines
options.description: Type of characters used to draw pane border lines. Some of these are only supported on terminals with UTF-8 support.

options.name: pane-border-status
options.description: Position of the pane status lines.

options.name: pane-border-style
options.description: Style of the pane status lines.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: pane-colours
options.description: The default colour palette for colours zero to 255.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: pane-scrollbars
options.description: Pane scrollbar state.

options.name: pane-scrollbars-position
options.description: Pane scrollbar position.

options.name: pane-scrollbars-style
options.description: Style of the pane scrollbar.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: pane-status-current-style
options.description: Style of the current pane in the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: pane-status-style
options.description: Style of panes in the status line, except the current pane.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: popup-border-lines
options.description: Type of characters used to draw popup border lines. Some of these are only supported on terminals with UTF-8 support.

options.name: popup-border-style
options.description: Default style of popup borders.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: popup-style
options.description: Default style of popups.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: prefix
options.description: The prefix key.

notes: Base key names are static, but modifiers, UTF-8 keys, hex codepoints, and UserN keys expand the valid space.

options.name: prefix-timeout
options.description: The timeout for the prefix key if no subsequent key is pressed. Zero means disabled.

options.name: prefix2
options.description: A second prefix key.

notes: Base key names are static, but modifiers, UTF-8 keys, hex codepoints, and UserN keys expand the valid space.

options.name: prompt-command-cursor-style
options.summary: Cursor style in vi prompt command mode
options.description: Style of the cursor in the command prompt when in command mode, if 'status-keys' is set to 'vi'.

options.name: prompt-cursor-colour
options.description: Colour of the cursor when in the command prompt.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: prompt-cursor-style
options.description: Style of the cursor when in the command prompt.

options.name: prompt-history-limit
options.description: Maximum number of commands to keep in history.

options.name: remain-on-exit
options.description: Whether panes should remain ('on'), remain until a key is pressed ('key') or be automatically killed ('off' or 'failed') when the program inside exits.

options.name: remain-on-exit-format
options.description: Message shown after the program in a pane has exited, if remain-on-exit is enabled.

options.name: renumber-windows
options.description: Whether windows are automatically renumbered rather than leaving gaps.

options.name: repeat-time
options.description: Time to wait for a key binding to repeat, if it is bound with the '-r' flag.

options.name: scroll-on-clear
options.description: Whether the contents of the screen should be scrolled intohistory when clearing the whole screen.

options.name: session-status-current-style
options.description: Style of the current session in the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: session-status-style
options.description: Style of sessions in the status line, except the current session.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: set-clipboard
options.description: Whether to attempt to set the system clipboard ('on' or 'external') and whether to allow applications to create paste buffers with an escape sequence ('on' only).

options.name: set-titles
options.description: Whether to set the terminal title, if supported.

options.name: set-titles-string
options.description: Format of the terminal title to set.

options.name: silence-action
options.description: Action to take on a silence alert.

options.name: status
options.summary: Show or size the status line
options.description: Number of lines in the status line.

options.name: status-bg
options.description: Background colour of the status line. This option is deprecated, use 'status-style' instead.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: status-fg
options.description: Foreground colour of the status line. This option is deprecated, use 'status-style' instead.

notes: Named colours are static, but colourN/colorN and #RRGGBB are pattern forms.

options.name: status-format
options.description: Formats for the status lines. Each array member is the format for one status line. The default status line is made up of several components which may be configured individually with other options such as 'status-left'.

options.name: status-interval
options.description: Number of seconds between status line updates.

options.name: status-justify
options.description: Position of the window list in the status line.

options.name: status-keys
options.summary: Key bindings for the command prompt
options.description: Key set to use at the command prompt.

options.name: status-left
options.summary: Left side of the status line
options.description: Contents of the left side of the status line.

options.name: status-left-length
options.description: Maximum width of the left side of the status line.

options.name: status-left-style
options.description: Style of the left side of the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: status-position
options.description: Position of the status line.

options.name: status-right
options.summary: Right side of the status line
options.description: Contents of the right side of the status line.

options.name: status-right-length
options.description: Maximum width of the right side of the status line.

options.name: status-right-style
options.description: Style of the right side of the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: status-style
options.description: Style of the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: synchronize-panes
options.summary: Send input to all panes in the window
options.description: Whether typing should be sent to all panes simultaneously.

options.name: terminal-features
options.summary: Terminal feature overrides by TERM pattern
options.description: List of terminal features, used if they cannot be automatically detected.

notes: Feature names are static, but the terminal glob is dynamic and unknown features are only logged.

options.name: terminal-overrides
options.summary: Terminal capability overrides by TERM pattern
options.description: List of terminal capabilities overrides.

notes: Capability names are static. Use :: to encode a literal colon inside a segment.

options.name: tiled-layout-max-columns
options.summary: Column limit for the tiled layout
options.description: Maximum number of columns in the 'tiled' layout. A value of 0 means no limit.

options.name: update-environment
options.summary: Env vars copied into session environment
options.description: List of environment variables to update in the session environment when a client is attached.

default_source.value: DISPLAY KRB5CCNAME MSYSTEM SSH_ASKPASS SSH_AUTH_SOCK SSH_AGENT_PID SSH_CONNECTION WINDOWID XAUTHORITY

options.name: user-keys
options.description: User key assignments. Each sequence in the list is translated into a key: 'User0', 'User1' and so on.

notes: Each array item becomes User0, User1, and so on.

options.name: variation-selector-always-wide
options.summary: Treat Unicode VS16 as always wide
options.description: If the Unicode VS16 codepoint should always be treated as a wide character.

options.name: visual-activity
options.description: How activity alerts should be shown: a message ('on'), a message and a bell ('both') or nothing ('off').

options.name: visual-bell
options.description: How bell alerts should be shown: a message ('on'), a message and a bell ('both') or nothing ('off').

options.name: visual-silence
options.description: How silence alerts should be shown: a message ('on'), a message and a bell ('both') or nothing ('off').

options.name: window-active-style
options.description: Default style of the active pane.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: window-size
options.description: How window size is calculated. 'latest' uses the size of the most recently used client, 'largest' the largest client, 'smallest' the smallest client and 'manual' a size set by the 'resize-window' command.

options.name: window-status-activity-style
options.summary: Style for activity windows in status line
options.description: Style of windows in the status line with an activity alert.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: window-status-bell-style
options.summary: Style for bell windows in status line
options.description: Style of windows in the status line with a bell alert.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: window-status-current-format
options.summary: Format for current window in status line
options.description: Format of the current window in the status line.

options.name: window-status-current-style
options.summary: Style for current window in status line
options.description: Style of the current window in the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: window-status-format
options.summary: Format for windows in status line
options.description: Format of windows in the status line, except the current window.

options.name: window-status-last-style
options.summary: Style for last active window in status line
options.description: Style of the last window in the status line.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: window-status-separator
options.description: Separator between windows in the status line.

options.name: window-status-style
options.summary: Style for windows in status line
options.description: Style of windows in the status line, except the current and last windows.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: window-style
options.description: Default style of panes that are not the active pane.

notes: If the value has no #{...} expansion, tmux validates it with style_parse at set time.
If #{...} appears, validation is deferred until runtime expansion.

options.name: word-separators
options.description: Characters considered to separate words.

options.name: wrap-search
options.description: Whether searching in copy mode should wrap at the top or bottom.

options.name: xterm-keys
options.description: Whether xterm-style function key sequences should be sent. This option is no longer used.

options.name: after-bind-key
options.description: Hook option: after-bind-key

notes: Hook arrays store tmux command strings.
Values are parsed immediately by the tmux command parser.
